parsed_output.justification: Justin's behavior is highly characteristic of the Tanner; he repeatedly encourages the other players to vote for him and creates a convoluted narrative to make himself appear to be the Werewolf. Paul claims to be the Witch, James claims to be the Troublemaker, and Paul identifies Mitchell as the Apprentice Seer. If these claims are true, all four players are either Village-aligned or the Tanner, meaning the Werewolf card must be in the center. In this scenario, Team Village wins if no one is voted out.
